# Netscape HTTP Cookie File
# http://curl.haxx.se/rfc/cookie_format.html
# This is a generated file!  Do not edit.

# To solve "Sign in to confirm you’re not a bot" errors:
# 1. Install "Get cookies.txt LOCALLY" extension for Chrome/Firefox
# 2. Go to YouTube and log in
# 3. Export cookies to this file (cookies.txt) locally
# 4. Restart the bot
